name: Abhishek Pratap Shah
profileSummary: Abhishek Pratap Shah is a Nepalese politician belonging to Nepali Congress. He serves as the member of parliament for Kapilvastu 3. He was previously a member of the first and second Constituent Assembly of Nepal representing Kapilvastu 5. Shah filed a complaint against former prime minister K. P. Sharma Oli for firing on the protesters in the Gen Z strike.
